name: cv-opti
description: Comprehensive CV/resume optimization for the dual-AI hiring landscape. Reformat and rewrite CVs to pass both ATS (Applicant Tracking System) screening and employer fraud detection while maintaining authentic, verifiable claims. Use when creating a new CV, optimizing an existing resume, preparing for job applications, addressing employment gaps, or struggling with resume rejections. Produces both a reformatted CV and a detailed strategy document explaining all changes and reasoning.
